title: How TSMC Helped SK Hynix Overtake Samsung in the AI Memory Race
text:
K

karin623
Member

For years, SK hynix was the semiconductor industry's perennial runner-up, living in Samsung's shadow and struggling to close the gap with its larger rival.

Then AI happened.

As Nvidia's HBM demand exploded, the company once dismissed as an underdog suddenly found itself at the center of the most important supply chain in technology. Last month, SK hynix briefly surpassed Samsung in market value. Now, it is preparing for a historic Nasdaq ADR listing in the United States.

But this reversal didn't begin with ChatGPT.

It began more than a decade ago with a forgotten product launch, an obscure packaging technology called CoWoS, and an unlikely partner: TSMC.

How did the AI era turn memory into the industry's new kingmaker? And what role did TSMC play in one of the most remarkable turnarounds in semiconductor history?

How TSMC Helped SK Hynix Overtake Samsung in the AI Memory Race

Liang-rong Chen

cwnewsroom.substack.com
